channel.title: European Company and Financial Law Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in European Company and Financial Law Review

item.title: 269Redefining the Conceptual Ground of Corporate Governance Regulation
item.description: Article by Iuliia Khort DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ecfr-2024-0016
